text.title: API-First Development Checklist
text.summary: Phase-by-phase checklist from spec design through contract testing, covering the eight stages of API-first workflow.

rule.statement: Define API title, version, description, authentication method, rate limiting strategy, and server URLs before writing any endpoint.
rule.rationale: Global settings establish the contract envelope. Authentication schemes defined globally and referenced per-operation prevent inconsistent security definitions.

list.item: Define API title, version (semantic), and description with auth + rate limit docs
List production and staging server URLs
Plan versioning strategy (/v1/, /v2/) before writing first endpoint
Define global security schemes (bearerAuth, apiKey, OAuth2)

rule.statement: Assign an operationId to every endpoint; without it, SDK generators and mock routers produce unusable output.
rule.rationale: openapi-generator uses operationId for function names. Prism uses it for routing. Blank operationIds produce conflicts or random names that break generated code.

list.item: Design all resource endpoints (/resources, /resources/{id})
Define HTTP methods per endpoint (GET/POST/PUT/DELETE/PATCH)
Assign camelCase operationId to every operation
Define request parameters (path, query, body) with types and constraints
Design success responses (200, 201) and all error responses
Include at least one example per POST/PUT/PATCH endpoint
Define all reusable schemas under components/schemas
Mark required properties explicitly
Set format hints (uuid, date-time, email, uri)
Define validation constraints (minLength, maxLength, minimum, maximum, pattern)
Use $ref for all shared schemas — never inline the same shape twice
Define global error schema and reference from all error responses

rule.statement: Run Spectral linting before generating mock servers or code; lint errors that break mock server routing are blocking, style issues are deferrable.
rule.rationale: Spectral catches $ref to non-existent components, missing required fields, and naming violations. Unresolved $refs crash Prism. Style issues can be addressed after first mock deployment.

list.item: Run Spectral with project ruleset (.spectral.yaml)
Categorize violations: (1) errors blocking mock server, (2) SDK generation warnings, (3) deferrable style issues
Verify all operations have examples
Check consistent naming conventions across all endpoints
Generate mock server: prism mock openapi.yaml --port 4010
Test all endpoints with mock data before backend implementation starts
Generate server stubs from spec: openapi-generator-cli generate
Generate client SDKs for all consumer languages
Write contract tests (Dredd/Pact) that run in CI on every PR
Gate merge on contract tests passing — prevents spec drift
Run bump diff on every PR to surface breaking changes
